name: 22_Sentiment_Analysis_LSTM_IMDb_DL
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mradi wa uchambuzi wa hisia ukitumia mfano wa LSTM na seti ya data ya IMDb? Tafadhali tekeleza usafishaji wa data katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji. Tumia embeddings za maneno kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na uhifadhi embeddings hizi chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Kisha tumia embeddings hizi kama ingizo la mfano wa LSTM, ambao unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi ripoti ya uainishaji kwa `results/metrics/classification_report.txt`. Unda Jupyter Notebook iliyohifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb` na usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo umeonyeshwa. Pia, hifadhi mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi kwa `results/figures/training_curves.png`. Embeddings zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) zinapendekezwa ili kuboresha utendaji wa mfano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.
Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.
Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.
Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb`.
Mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_curves.png`.

preferences.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinapaswa kuwa zilizofunzwa awali (mfano, Word2Vec au GloVe) ili kutumia maarifa ya kisemantiki yaliyopo.
Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kuwa na maelezo mazuri, ikifanya iwe rahisi kwa wengine kuelewa usanifu wa mfano na mchakato wa mafunzo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya hakiki za filamu ya "IMDb" inatumika.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa moja kwa moja katika msimbo au muundo wa faili unaoonyesha kuwa seti ya data ya IMDb inatumika. Faili za msimbo (`data_loader.py` na `model.py`) zina maudhui ya kawaida ya kiolezo na hazionyeshi upakiaji, usindikaji, au utumiaji wa seti ya data halisi ya IMDb. Ingawa trajectory inarejelea hatua za "Load IMDb Dataset" na "Save IMDb Dataset", hii ni taarifa ya mazingira tu na sio ushahidi wa kutosha wa utekelezaji halisi katika msimbo.

judge_stats.criteria: Usafishaji wa data unatekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa maneno ya kusitisha na alama za uakifishaji.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` does not implement data cleaning, removal of stop words, or punctuation processing. The file contains only a minimal placeholder structure with requirement definitions and dummy functions (`load_dataset()`, `build_transforms()`). There is no actual logic for text preprocessing, tokenization, or the specified cleaning operations. The trajectory evidence notes the file executed without errors, but this does not demonstrate that the required functionality is implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Embeddings za maneno zinatumika kubadilisha maandishi kuwa muundo wa nambari na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies that word embeddings should be used to convert text to numerical format and stored under `models/saved_models/`. While the trajectory evidence mentions the creation, saving, and loading of a `w2v_model.joblib` file in that directory, the actual code files provided (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) contain only minimal placeholder implementations with no functional code for generating, using, or saving word embeddings. The key evidence from the source files does not demonstrate the implementation of this requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "LSTM" unatumika kwa uchambuzi wa hisia na unapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence shows that `src/model.py` contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging with placeholder functions like `build_model()` that returns "model placeholder". The file does not contain an actual LSTM model implementation for sentiment analysis. The trajectory evidence mentions successful execution and training, but the actual code content does not match the requirement of implementing an LSTM model in `src/model.py`.

<UNSATISFIED>
The classification report file `results/metrics/classification_report.txt` exists but contains only the placeholder content `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, indicating it does not contain the actual evaluation metrics or classification report. The file was created during a fix for a path error, but the content shows it was not populated with meaningful results from model evaluation.

judge_stats.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inayojumuisha usanifu wa mfano na uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa mafunzo inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.ipynb`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The Jupyter Notebook `results/report.ipynb` was successfully generated and saved in the workspace, as confirmed by the project structure showing the file exists in the `results` directory and the trajectory evidence indicating both the `generate_report` and `save_report` operations completed without errors or warnings.

judge_stats.criteria: Mikondo ya hasara ya mafunzo na usahihi inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/training_curves.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is to generate and save training loss and accuracy curves as `results/figures/training_curves.png`. While the trajectory evidence indicates the file was saved successfully without errors, the key evidence shows an error when attempting to read the image file: "No endpoints found that support image input". This suggests the system cannot verify the actual content or existence of the image file. The presence of this error in the provided evidence means the successful generation and saving of the curves cannot be confirmed from the available information.
